raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XX/XX/XXXX, I signed up for a 14-day trial on XXXX for XXXX XXXX. The terms did not clearly disclose that it would auto-convert to a recurring subscription. 

No email, invoice, payment reminder, or renewal notification was ever sent before, during, or after the trial ended. 

Despite receiving no notice, my American Express card was charged XXXX XXXX by XXXX without my authorization or consent. The charge appeared on my statement in XX/XX/XXXX. 

Actions taken by me : XXXX. On XXXX XX/XX/XXXX, I emailed XXXX requesting immediate cancellation and a full refund, citing violation of XXXX Directive XXXX and XXXX Civil Code 312j XXXX which mandate pre-renewal notification. No reply received. 
XXXX. On XXXX XX/XX/XXXX, I filed a formal complaint with XXXX XXXX, the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. XXXX logged. 
XXXX. I contacted my card issuer XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX and American Express to report the merchant for Recurring Billing violations. I requested a Merchant Violation investigation. 

This practice violates American Express Recurring Billing Policy section 3.12 and constitutes an unlawful Abofalle subscription trap.
